query:
SELECT 'contracts' as tbl, section, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM contracts GROUP BY section
UNION ALL
SELECT 'installments', section, COUNT(*) FROM installments GROUP BY section
UNION ALL
SELECT 'customers', section, COUNT(*) FROM customers GROUP BY section
UNION ALL
SELECT 'partners', section, COUNT(*) FROM partners GROUP BY section
ORDER BY tbl, section;
